items.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs 2026: Bracket, schedule, scores, news
items.description: From the first round all the way through the Stanley Cup Final, ESPN has you covered this NHL postseason.

items.headline: Sources: Transfer Donnie Freeman commits to St. John's
items.description: Syracuse transfer Donnie Freeman has committed to St. John's, sources told ESPN, with the Red Storm beating out Kentucky for the talented forward.

items.headline: Mike Krzyzewski's grandson charged with misdemeanor DWI in collision that killed teen
items.description: Joseph Savarino, a grandson of retired Mike Krzyzewski, has been charged with misdemeanor driving while impaired in connection with a collision that killed a 15-year-old bicyclist.

items.headline: Agustín Ramírez homers and Marlins halt Cardinals' winning streak with 5-3 victory
items.description: — Agustín Ramírez homered and Max Meyer pitched effectively into the sixth inning to lead the Miami Marlins to a 5-3 victory over St. Louis on Monday night, snapping the Cardinals' five-game winning streak.

items.headline: Mitchell, Harden help Cavaliers roll past Raptors for 2-0 lead
items.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points, James Harden added 28 and the Cavaliers never trailed against the Raptors on Monday night.

items.headline: Who has played the most NBA playoff games without a title?
items.description: Chris Paul, Patrick Ewing and John Stockton are among NBA greats who have played the most playoff games without winning a championship.

items.headline: Mitchell scores 30, Harden adds 28 as Cavaliers beat Raptors 115-105 for 2-0 series lead
items.description: — Donovan Mitchell scored 30 points, James Harden added 28 and the Cleveland Cavaliers held on for a 115-105 victory over the Toronto Raptors on Monday night for a 2-0 lead in their Eastern Conference first-round series.

items.headline: Men's college basketball transfer portal live: Tracking news, updates
items.description: The latest news and updates for players entering -- and exiting -- the transfer portal for the 2026-27 season.

items.headline: Bryce Elder strikes out 6 in 6 2/3 and the Braves win 6th straight with 9-4 victory over Nationals
items.description: — Matt Olson had three RBI, Bryce Elder struck out six in 6 2/3 innings and the Atlanta Braves won their sixth straight game with a 9-4 victory over the Washington Nationals on Monday night.

items.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Eastern Conference first-round takeaways
items.description: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Eastern Conference's first round.

items.headline: Rookie Sal Stewart hits his 8th homer as Reds top Rays 6-1 for 4th straight win
items.description: — Rookie Sal Stewart homered, doubled, stole a base and scored twice as the Cincinnati Reds beat the Tampa Bay Rays 6-1 on Monday night for their fourth straight win.

items.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
items.description: The Eastern and Western Conference playoff brackets are set after Sunday's games. See the full schedule of games.

items.headline: Isaac Paredes' first 2 home runs of season power slumping Astros to 9-2 victory over Guardians
items.description: — Isaac Paredes hit his first two home runs of the season and Christian Walker also went deep as the Houston Astros beat the Cleveland Guardians 9-2 on Monday night for just their third victory in 15 games.

items.headline: Wolves' Finch irked by calls: 'Maybe we gotta start flopping'
items.description: Wolves coach Chris Finch reiterated his frustration with Jamal Murray's 16 free throws in Game 1, arguing that his players don't get calls because they don't flop.

items.headline: Super Rugby Pacific boss says competition in 'good health', flags expansion interest
items.description: Super Rugby Pacific boss Jack Mesley has claimed the competition is in "good health" despite the likely demise of Moana Pasifika, the CEO revealing that there is genuine "inbound interest" from other parties wanting to join the tournament.
